products.description: A traditional pant crafted using performance fabric and premium details.

products.name: Club Hoodie

products.name: Cypress Axe Thrower Polo II
products.description: The Axe Thrower is back. Engineered in two-layer jacquard for the heat and humidity of championship competition — this is the polo built for the biggest stages in the game.

products.name: Breakers Polo
products.description: Every color of the Championship, in one polo. Fully engineered yarn-dye block stripe in our Icon fabric — Heritage fit, three-button placket, and signature collar.

products.name: Molinos Wind Shell Crew
products.description: The Championship windshirt, in a limited run. Royal plaid woven in homage to King George VI — 128-gram Neolon Nylon with 4-way stretch, UV 50+ protection, and a subtle seersucker finish built for the unpredictable conditions of championship.

products.name: Reversible Corduroy Hoodie
products.description: A reversible stretch corduroy hoodie, featuring our Championship plaid and quilted logo embellishment.

products.name: Long Sleeve 3D Cashmere Polo
products.description: The cashmere polo. Whole garment. Seamless. Seasonless.

products.name: Royal Plaid Pima Cotton T-Shirt

products.name: Golf Hoodie
products.description: A limited edition brushed fleece hoodie, with a unique Chenille Golf logo application.

products.name: Pioneer Cypress
products.description: A golf shoe 40,000,000 steps in the making, built from the ground up with Tiger.

products.name: Pioneer Magnolia
products.description: The Pioneer Magnolia merges the high-performance foundation of the Pioneer Collection with the timeless elegance of a wingtip upper, delivering heritage style with modern technical advantages. Available in 5 colorways.

products.name: Osprey
products.description: A versatile golf shoe that seamlessly transitions from office to course, combining performance materials with minimalist design for the modern golfer's lifestyle. Available in four core colorways.

products.name: Osprey Limited Edition
products.description: A special, limited-edition of the Sun Day Red Osprey pays homage to golf’s toughest test. Part of the Summer Championship Collection, the Osprey LE features a clean, navy upper with restrained red details. A layered outsole design features our 15-Stripe Tiger logo in red, white, and blue with translucent traction elements to allow the logo to pop.

products.name: Jupiter Slide
products.description: A refined slide combining premium materials with minimalist design for the modern golfer's lifestyle. Available in four core colorways.

products.name: Presidio
products.description: Connection to the ground isn't just about traction—it's about the advantage you feel. The stability you trust. The precision between intention and execution.

products.name: Presidio Limited Edition
products.description: A special, limited-edition of the Sun Day Red Presidio pays homage to golf’s toughest test. Part of the Summer Championship Collection, the Presidio LE highlights the TPU Torsional Traction Plate and Lateral Stability brace in a pop of red, with a molten outsole effect in red, white, and blue.

products.name: Pioneer Willow
products.description: The details others overlook define the difference. The Pioneer Willow is designed where every spike placement, every pressure point, every millimeter of sole geometry serves the athlete first.

products.name: Pioneer Willow Limited Edition
products.description: Welcome to Spring Traditions. The Pioneer Willow arrives at one of golf's most celebrated moments, dressed for the occasion. Where performance meets the season's finest expression of style.

products.name: Cypress Cotton Crew Sock
products.description: Golf socks that craft the steps to success.

products.name: Legend High Crown Visor
products.description: Our classic high crown visor, era appropriate, constructed in a cotton twill with adjustable back and heritage rope, as originally crafted years ago.  Features a dimensional Tiger logo center front, and a woven label USA flag wearer's left.

products.name: 15 Stripes 54mm Tees
products.description: Custom 100 pack of 54 mm  birch wood 'stinger' height tees, with a 15 stripe pattern as a nod to Tiger's 15 major championships.

products.name: 84mm Tees
products.description: Custom 100 pack of 84mm 'high draw' tees, produced in authentic birch wood.
